mapper.select: SELECT c.*, b.bed_no, r.room_no, r.floor_id, f.floor_name, r.building_id, eb.building_name FROM elder_customer_checkin c LEFT JOIN elder_bed b ON b.id = c.bed_id LEFT JOIN elder_room r ON r.id = c.room_id LEFT JOIN elder_floor f ON f.id = r.floor_id LEFT JOIN elder_building eb ON eb.id = r.building_id WHERE c.del_flag = 0 AND c.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC limit 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM elder_bed b LEFT JOIN elder_room_reserve r ON b.id = r.bed_id AND r.`status` = '1' WHERE b.del_flag = 0 AND (b.`status` = '0' or (b.`status` = '1' AND r.customer_id = #{customerId})) AND b.id = #{bedId}

SELECT cc.*, b.bed_no, r.room_no, f.floor_name, be.building_name FROM elder_customer_checkin cc LEFT JOIN elder_bed b ON b.id = cc.bed_id LEFT JOIN elder_room r ON r.id = cc.room_id LEFT JOIN elder_floor f ON f.id = r.floor_id LEFT JOIN elder_building be ON be.id = r.building_id WHERE cc.del_flag = 0
AND cc.`status` = #{data.status}
AND cc.`consulting_id` LIKE concat(concat('%',#{data.consultingId}),'%')
AND cc.`customer_id` = #{data.customerId}
AND r.room_no LIKE concat(concat('%',#{data.roomNo}),'%')
AND cc.checkin_time BETWEEN concat(#{data.checkinTimeArr[0]},' 00:00:00') AND concat(#{data.checkinTimeArr[1]},' 23:59:59')
order by cc.create_time desc
SELECT id FROM sys_tenant WHERE del_flag = 0
